coverage_notes: Narrow smoke: actor Blueprint creation and EventGraph signal without multi-surface distraction. Use for regressions on asset_create, build_blueprint handoff, and graph tools.

turns.request: Under /Game/AIHarness/ActorGraphFocus/ create a new Actor Blueprint with a short memorable name, parented to Actor, if the folder exists; otherwise use /Game/AIHarness/MultiSurfaceBuilder/ or /Game/AIHarness/.

For that actor: when the game begins, print a single short line to the screen or log so we can see it fired. Use the plugin's recommended path (build_blueprint handoff if graph mutations are not on your main tool list, then builder tools).
Compile the Blueprint if needed and report whether the compiler is clean.
